scripts.build-backend: npx tsc src/db.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && npx tsc src/ipc-handler.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && npx tsc src/google-calendar.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && npx tsc src/preload.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module commonjs --skipLibCheck
scripts.build: npm run build-backend && npm run build-frontend && npm run build-backend && npm run fix-html-paths
scripts.fix-html-paths: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/index.html'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('dist/index.html fehlt'); process.exit(0);} const html=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const fixed=html.replace(/([\"'])\.\.\/assets\//g,'$1./assets/').replace(/([\"'])\.\.\/vite\.svg/g,'$1./vite.svg').replace(/([\"'])\/assets\//g,'$1./assets/').replace(/([\"'])\/vite\.svg/g,'$1./vite.svg'); fs.writeFileSync(p,fixed); console.log('HTML-Pfade korrigiert (idempotent)');"
scripts.start: npm run build-all && npm run start-electron
scripts.electron: concurrently "npm run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron . http://localhost:5173"
